title: Cyber Security: Essentials for Managers and Leaders
description:
Lead with Confidence. Govern with Clarity. Secure What Matters.

In an era where cyber threats are a constant presence, leadership is no longer optional in the fight against cybercrime, it’s essential. Cyber security can no longer sit solely with the IT team. Boards, executives, and senior managers must be prepared to ask the right questions, interpret the right data, and make the right decisions.

Cyber Starts at the Top

This course is built specifically for non-technical leaders, CFOs, Strategy Officers, Chiefs of Staff, Operations Directors, and other decision-makers who want to confidently lead in a digital world. Whether you're shaping strategy, overseeing risk, or governing transformation, cyber security is now part of your leadership responsibility.

Developed by Macquarie University’s Cyber Skills Academy, ranked in the top 1% of universities globally and a national leader in cyber security education, this course bridges the communication gap between cyber specialists and business leaders, empowering you to lead with insight and clarity.

Throughout the course, you’ll learn how to:
- Understand cyber threats, risks, and mitigation strategies in plain language, no jargon, no fluff.
-  Align cyber security goals with your organisation’s strategic priorities and risk appetite.
- Read and interpret cyber metrics, dashboards, and board-level reports with confidence.
- Communicate effectively with security teams and non-technical stakeholders alike.
- Navigate key legal, regulatory, and compliance frameworks to make informed governance decisions.
- Champion a security-first culture and drive meaningful behavioural change from the top down.

Why It Matters
Cyber security failures are no longer just technical issues; they’re business, financial, and reputational crises. From operational disruptions and legal consequences to loss of customer trust, the impact of cyber incidents reaches every corner of an organisation.

Leaders who understand and engage in cyber governance are better equipped to prevent, manage, and recover from these challenges.

Designed for Influence
Cyber Security for Managers and Leaders is self-paced, practical, and designed for immediate relevance. It’s ideal for executives, senior managers, and team leads who want to make informed decisions, oversee risk, and lead their organisation’s cyber security strategy with clarity and conviction.

Cyber resilience is a leadership competency. This is where it begins.
